appointments.notes:
Hi Craigo


Your consultation with Evolute Solutions is scheduled for 12 Mar 2026 at 12:00 (America/New_York) .


We’ll be meeting here: Google Meet


Please click the “YES” button in this email to confirm your attendance and add it into your calendar.


Before the call, it’s *very* important that you review the information in this link:


https://evolutesolutions.io/important-prepare-for-your-ai-consultation


This will show you exactly how the system works so you can confirm it makes sense for your business and is worth your time to come on the call.


This allows us to use the call to focus entirely on your specific situation instead of explaining the basics.

Inside, you will see:

• Real client results

• How we deliver exclusive branded leads plus AI that automatically follows up and books estimates

• Why this is different (no shared leads like Angi or Thumbtack, no bidding wars)

• What happens on the call (learn your business, show the system, map your growth plan, and decide fit)


It takes less than 10 minutes.


Please watch this before your call, and reply “done” via text once you’ve watched it.

Need to make changes to this event? Cancel Event: https://app.iclosed.io/cancellations/call_9bTWCHJlVJC_ Reschedule Event: https://app.iclosed.io/reschedulings/call_9bTWCHJlVJC_
